deductions.name: Employer's contribution to NPS
deductions.description: Employer's contribution to National Pension Scheme (up to 14% of salary for central govt, 10% for others)
deductions.note: Up to 14% of salary (Basic + DA) for Central Govt employees, 10% for others

deductions.name: Standard Deduction
deductions.description: Flat deduction from salary income (enhanced in Budget 2024)

rebates.name: Rebate under section 87A
rebates.note: Effectively makes income up to ₹12 Lakh tax-free (₹12.75 Lakh for salaried with Standard Deduction)

budget_highlights: No tax for income up to ₹4 Lakh (raised from ₹3 Lakh)
Section 87A rebate increased to ₹60,000 (from ₹25,000), making income up to ₹12 Lakh effectively tax-free
New slab structure with 7 brackets instead of 6
Maximum surcharge capped at 25% under new regime
